# i2V Systems

> i2V Systems is an AI-powered video surveillance and intelligent security technology company. We develop enterprise-grade Video Management Software (VMS), AI Video Analytics, Automatic Number Plate Recognition (ANPR), Face Recognition Software (FRS), Intelligent Traffic Management Systems (ITMS), and Integrated Command & Control Centers (ICCC) for governments, smart cities, enterprises, and critical infrastructure operators worldwide.

i2V's platform is designed for scalability — from single-site deployments to city-wide surveillance networks managing thousands of cameras. Our solutions are trusted across 15+ industries including airports, railways, oil & gas, smart cities, healthcare, retail, law enforcement, and financial institutions.

---

## Core Products

- [AI Video Management Software (VMS)](https://www.i2vsys.com/products/video-management-software/): Centralised, AI-based VMS for enterprise surveillance. Supports intelligent alerts, third-party integrations, and large-scale camera management.
- [AI-Powered Video Analytics](https://www.i2vsys.com/products/ai-powered-video-analytics/): 30+ AI detection models for real-time threat detection, crowd analytics, PPE compliance, intrusion detection, and more.
- [All Video Analytics Features](https://www.i2vsys.com/products/ai-powered-video-analytics/all-video-analytics-features/): Complete library of 30+ AI models across safety, security, and operational use cases.
- [Automatic Number Plate Recognition (ANPR)](https://www.i2vsys.com/products/automatic-number-plate-recognition/): High-accuracy ANPR/ALPR software for vehicle tracking, parking management, and traffic enforcement.
- [Face Recognition Software (FRS)](https://www.i2vsys.com/products/face-recognition-software/): Biometric facial recognition for access control, watchlist management, and public safety.
- [Intelligent Traffic Management System (ITMS)](https://www.i2vsys.com/products/intelligent-traffic-management-system/): AI-driven traffic monitoring, analytics, and enforcement for smarter and safer roads.
- [Central Monitoring System (CMS)](https://www.i2vsys.com/products/central-monitoring-system/): Unified platform to manage cameras, sensors, and alerts across multiple sites.
- [Integrated Command & Control Center (ICCC)](https://www.i2vsys.com/products/integrated-command-and-control-center/): Real-time data fusion and AI analytics for city and enterprise command operations.
- [All Products Overview](https://www.i2vsys.com/products/): Full portfolio of i2V's AI surveillance and security software solutions.

---

## Industries We Serve

- [Industries Overview](https://www.i2vsys.com/industries-we-serve/): AI surveillance solutions tailored for 15+ sectors.
- [Smart Cities](https://www.i2vsys.com/industries/smart-cities/): AI-powered urban surveillance and intelligent traffic management for city operators.
- [Airport](https://www.i2vsys.com/industries/airport/): Unified terminal-to-airside security with offline-first resilience and aviation compliance.
- [Transportation](https://www.i2vsys.com/industries/transportation/): Intelligent video surveillance for highways, logistics hubs, and transit networks.
- [Railway & Metro](https://www.i2vsys.com/industries/railway-metro/): Real-time station, depot, and on-board surveillance for safe rail operations.
- [Law Enforcement](https://www.i2vsys.com/industries/law-enforcement/): AI facial recognition, ANPR, and video analytics tools for police and public safety agencies.
- [Oil & Gas](https://www.i2vsys.com/industries/oil-and-gas/): Perimeter protection and intrusion detection for refineries, pipelines, and offshore assets.
- [Energy](https://www.i2vsys.com/industries/energy/): Intelligent surveillance for power plants, substations, solar farms, and energy infrastructure.
- [Industrial](https://www.i2vsys.com/industries/industrial/): Worker safety enforcement, perimeter security, and compliance monitoring for factories and plants.
- [Healthcare](https://www.i2vsys.com/industries/healthcare/): AI video surveillance for hospitals, clinics, and medical campuses.
- [Financial Institutions](https://www.i2vsys.com/industries/financial-institutions/): Smart security for banks, ATMs, and financial branch networks.
- [Retail](https://www.i2vsys.com/industries/retail/): Loss prevention, footfall analytics, and customer behaviour insights for retail environments.
- [Education](https://www.i2vsys.com/industries/education/): Campus security and intrusion detection for schools and universities.
- [Hospitality](https://www.i2vsys.com/industries/hospitality/): Guest safety and staff management for hotels and resorts.

- [Why Choose i2V](https://www.i2vsys.com/why-choose-i2v/): 50+ smart analytics, proven scalability, cost-effective deployment, and enterprise-grade reliability.

- [Technology Partners](https://www.i2vsys.com/our-partners/technology-partners/): Hardware and software integration partners.

## Newsroom & Insights

- [Newsroom & Blog](https://www.i2vsys.com/newsroom-blog/): Latest news, project deployments, and AI surveillance industry insights.
- [Passenger Safety in Aviation & Transportation](https://www.i2vsys.com/newsroom/passenger-safety-in-a-changing-world-the-role-of-intelligent-surveillance-in-aviation-and-transportation/): How intelligent surveillance is reshaping passenger safety.
- [Modern Border Security & Intelligent Surveillance](https://www.i2vsys.com/newsroom/modern-border-security-in-a-changing-world-the-role-of-intelligent-surveillance/): The role of AI in protecting national borders.
- [Securing Critical Infrastructure in 2026](https://www.i2vsys.com/newsroom/securing-critical-infrastructure-in-2026-from-oil-gas-to-smart-cities/): From oil & gas to smart cities — AI surveillance for critical assets.
- [Chennai Smart City Deployment](https://www.i2vsys.com/newsroom/chennai-smart-city-deployment-scaling-surveillance-across-thousands-of-cameras/): How i2V scaled surveillance across thousands of cameras in Chennai.
- [i2V Innovation Takes Centre Stage](https://www.i2vsys.com/newsroom/i2vs-innovation-takes-center-stage/): Latest product innovations and technology highlights.
- [ITMS & VMS Installed in Himachal Pradesh, Mandi](https://www.i2vsys.com/newsroom/i2v-itms-vms-successfully-installed-in-himachal-pradesh-mandi/): AI traffic and surveillance deployment in Mandi.
- [Airport Security Innovation at Inter Passenger Terminal Show 2025](https://www.i2vsys.com/newsroom/advancing-airport-security-innovation-at-inter-passenger-terminal-show-2025/): i2V's airport security showcase at IPS 2025.
- [Crowd Management VMS at Mahakumbh, Haridwar](https://www.i2vsys.com/newsroom/i2v-crowd-management-vms-successfully-installed-in-haridwar-for-mahakumbh-festival/): Managing millions of pilgrims with AI crowd analytics.
- [ICCC & VMS Deployed in Saharanpur Smart City](https://www.i2vsys.com/newsroom/i2v-command-and-control-psim-along-with-vms-successfully-installed-in-saharanpur-smart-city/): Command & control surveillance deployment for Saharanpur.
- [Digital Transformation at DTC Bhubaneswar 2025](https://www.i2vsys.com/newsroom/accelerating-digital-transformation-at-dtc-bhubaneswar-2025/): i2V's role in accelerating smart city digital transformation.

## Resources & Downloads

- [Resource Centre](https://www.i2vsys.com/resource-center/): All brochures, datasheets, and solution guides in one place.
- [Complete Product Brochure](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/complete-product-brochure/): Full overview of i2V's AI surveillance portfolio.
- [Smart City Brochure](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/smart-city-brochure/): AI surveillance and ICCC solutions for smart city operators.
- [Airport Brochure](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/airport-brochure/): Perimeter, terminal, and airside security solutions for airports.
- [Traffic Brochure](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/traffic-brochure/): Intelligent traffic management solutions overview.
- [Industry Brochure](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/industry-brochure/): Sector-specific AI surveillance capabilities.
- [Retail Brochure](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/retail-brochure/): Loss prevention and customer analytics for retail.
- [VMS Datasheet](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/i2v-vms-datasheet/): Technical specs for i2V's Video Management Software.
- [Video Analytics Datasheet](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/i2v-va-datashet/): AI models, accuracy benchmarks, and integration specs.
- [ANPR Datasheet](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/i2v-anpr-datasheet/): Number plate recognition technical specifications.
- [FRS Datasheet](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/i2v-frs-datasheet/): Face recognition software specifications and use cases.
- [ITMS Datasheet](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/i2v-itms-datasheet/): Intelligent traffic management system technical details.
- [CMS Datasheet](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/i2v-cms-datasheet/): Central monitoring system architecture and features.
- [ICCC Datasheet](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/i2v-iccc-datasheet/): Command and control centre specifications.
- [VMS for NVR Rolling Stock Datasheet](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/i2v-vms-for-nvr-rolling-stock-application-datasheet/): VMS for train and metro coach deployments.
- [MNVR Rolling Stock Datasheet](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/i2v-mnvr-rolling-stock-application-datasheet/): Mobile NVR specs for buses, trains, and transit vehicles.
- [MIC Rolling Stock Datasheet](https://www.i2vsys.com/resources/i2v-mic-rolling-stock-application-datasheet/): In-vehicle computing for rolling stock video analytics.
